activity_summary.terms_text: Ngiyaqonda ukuthi ulwazi oluhlinzekwe yilolu hlu lwemibuzo akuhloselwe ukuthatha indawo yeseluleko, ukuxilongwa, noma ukwelashwa okunikezwa uchwepheshe wezempilo noma wengqondo, nokuthi izimpendulo zami ezingaziwa zingasetshenziswa futhi kwabelwane ngazo ukuze kwenziwe ucwaningo olujwayelekile mayelana nempilo yengqondo yezingane.
activity_summary.footer_text: I-CHILD MIND INSTITUTE, INC. FUTHI UKWELASHWA KOMQONDO WENGANE, I-PLLC (NDAWONYE, “I-CMI”) AYISEBENZI NGEMITHI NGOKUQONDILE NOMA NGOKUNGAQONDILE NOMA IKHIPHE ISELULEKO SOKWELAPHA NJENGXENYE YALE MIBUZO. I-CMI AYITHATHI ISIBOPHO SOKUHLOLA, UKWELASHWA, ISINQUMO ESENZIWE, NOMA ISINYATHELO ESITHATHWE NGOKUTHEMBA ULWAZI OLUNIKEZWE NGALOLU LWEMIBUZO, FUTHI AYIQINISEKI ISIBOPHO NGOKUSEBENZISA KWAKHO LE MIBUZO.
activity_summary.category_suicide_message: Izinga elibalulekile: Umzali ubonise ubuxhwanguxhwangu obungase bube khona. Letha kudokotela ngokushesha ngenxa yesimo esiphuthumayo esingaba khona.
activity_summary.category_emotional_message: Ngaphakathi kwemikhawulo evamile: Akukho okunye ukuhlolwa noma ukuhlolwa okudingekayo.
activity_summary.category_sport_message: Ibanga Lezokwelashwa: Yazisa umtholampilo; Yenza ukuhlolwa kokulandelela (Kunconyiwe); Khiqiza ukudluliselwa.

about_app.curious_about:
## 
 ### Iyini i-Curious? 

 Le app iyingxenye yomthombo ovulekile wokuqoqwa kwedatha ye-Curious nenkundla yokuhlaziya eklanywe i-MATTER Lab ku-Child Mind Institute ([https://matter.childmind.org](https://matter.childmind.org)). 
 # 
 ### Yini ekwazi ukwenziwa yi-Curious? 

 Isethi yesici se-Curious iyakhula, futhi njengamanje isekela izinhlobo zokufaka ezibanzi. Isikrini ngasinye kumsebenzi Wokufuna ukwazi singafaka noma yikuphi kokulandelayo: 
  - Umbhalo, isithombe, nomsindo 
  - Umbuzo olandelwa isithombe kanye/noma izinketho zokuphendula umbhalo 
  - Ibha yesilayidi 
  - Okufakiwe kombhalo 
  - Ukufakwa kwethebula 
  - Irekhodi lomsindo 
  - Ukuthwebula isithombe/ividiyo 
  - Ukudweba noma ukuthepha 
  - I-geolocation yamanje 
  - Umsebenzi wengqondo elula 
  - Ukubambezeleka ngaphambi kwempendulo 
  - Isikhathi 
  - I-logic enemibandela yokunquma ukuthi uzoya kuphi ngokulandelayo 

 #### Ngingakufunda kuphi okwengeziwe? 
 Sicela uvakashele okuthi [https://mindlogger.org](https://mindlogger.org) ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe.  
 ## [Usekelo]({{credits_link}}) 
 ## [Imigomo yesevisi](https://mindlogger.org/terms-of-service) 
 ## [Inqubomgomo yobumfihlo](https://mindlogger.org/privacy-policy) 

 ##### Usale kahle, 

 ##### Ithimba Le-Curious 

 ##### I-Child Mind Institute

le app yezinjongo zokwelashwa noma zocwaningo.

geolocation.must_enable_location: Kufanele unike amandla amasevisi endawo ukuze uqedele lo msebenzi. Sicela unikeze imvume ye-Curious kumaSethingi akho e-iOS bese ucindezela inkinobho futhi.
geolocation.must_enable_location_subtitle: Kufanele unike amandla amasevisi endawo ukuze uqedele lo msebenzi. Sicela ucindezele inkinobho futhi bese unikeza i-Curious imvume yokusebenzisa indawo yakho.

permissions.alarm_permission_disabled: Sicela uvule izimvume ze-alamu kudivayisi yakho ukuze uthole izikhumbuzi ze-Curious ngesikhathi. Sicela uqaphele ukuthi i-app izovalwa ngokuzenzakalelayo uma usuvule izimvume ze-alamu.

data_invite.message:

Abantu abalandelayo bazokwazi ukufinyelela idatha yakho uma wamukela lesi simemo:

system.migration_not_applied_text: Ukuthuthwa kwedatha akuzange kusetshenziswe ngempumelelo. Sicela uthinte abosekelo.

activity_skip_popup.popup_description: Lesi sivivinyo asiphelele. Uma weqela esivivinyweni esilandelayo, ukuqhubeka kwakho kuzolondolozwa. Ngeke ukwazi ukuqeda lesi sivivinyo kamuva.

autocompletion.time_expired: Isikhathi sokuqeda okuthi {{activityNames}} siphelelwe yisikhathi. Izimpendulo zakho zizothunyelwa ngokuzenzakalelayo.
autocompletion.time_is_up_modal_description: Asisekho isikhathi sokusebenza kulo msebenzi. Wonke umsebenzi owenzile uzogcinwa futhi uhanjiswe.

dialog.body: Ukwabelana ngezimpendulo esidlangalaleni kusho ukuthi ulwazi olunikezwa abasebenzisi ngabanye, njengezimpendulo zenhlolovo noma impendulo, luzotholakala ngokusobala ukuze abanye balubuke.

assignment.banner: Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi zonke izimpendulo zakho zimayelana {{name}}

requestHealthRecordData.title: Cela Idatha Yerekhodi Lezempilo
requestHealthRecordData.linkText: Funda kabanzi mayelana nendlela i-Curious efinyelela ngayo ngokuphephile kudatha yokunakekelwa kwezempilo.
requestHealthRecordData.partnershipText:
I-Curious isebenzisa i-1upHealth’s Medical Information Service ukuze umcwaningi wakho akwazi ukufinyelela ulwazi kumarekhodi akho okunakekelwa kwezempilo.

Kuzikrini ezilandelayo, uzocelwa ukuthi ungene ngemvume kumasistimu akho Omhlinzeki Wokunakekelwa Kwezempilo futhi wabelane ngedatha yakho yokunakekelwa kwezempilo nalolu cwaningo. Uzobuyela emsebenzini we-Curious uma usuqedile.
requestHealthRecordData.additionalPromptText:
Usuqedile ukungena ku-akhawunti yakho yokunakekelwa kwezempilo.

Ungathanda ukungena ngemvume kunoma imaphi ama-akhawunti okunakekelwa kwezempilo engeziwe?
requestHealthRecordData.noResults: Abekho Abahlinzeki Bezempilo abatholakele abafana nosesho lwakho.

announcementBanner.content: <0>Senza kabusha!</0> <1>Izibuyekezo zedizayini zisendleleni—i-app enhle efanayo, ukubukeka okusha. Ufuna ukwazi?</1> <2>Thepha ukuze ufunde kabanzi.</2>

unity.error_message: Umsebenzi wehlulekile ukulayishwa, sicela uxhumane nombhali ukuze uthole usizo. Umsebenzi usuzophuma manje.
unity.error_message_flow: Umsebenzi wehlulekile ukulayishwa, sicela uxhumane nombhali ukuze uthole usizo. Uzoyiswa kumsebenzi olandelayo ekuhambeni:
unity.restart_message:
Umsebenzi uhlangabezane nephutha elibucayi futhi kufanele uphume. Idatha eqoqwe kulo msebenzi kuze kube manje izolahleka.

Ungaqala kabusha umsebenzi ukuze uzame futhi.
